<Heading as={"h1"} className={"openapi__heading"} children={"Discover Well-Known JSON Web Keys"}></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint method={"get"} path={"/.well-known/jwks.json"} context={"endpoint"}></MethodEndpoint>

This endpoint returns JSON Web Keys required to verifying OpenID Connect ID Tokens and, if enabled, OAuth 2.0 JWT Access Tokens.
This endpoint can be used with client libraries like [node-jwks-rsa](https://github.com/auth0/node-jwks-rsa) among others.

Adding custom keys requires first creating a keyset via the createJsonWebKeySet operation, and then configuring the
webfinger.jwks.broadcast_keys configuration value to include the keyset name.

<ParamsDetails></ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema {...require("./discover-json-web-keys.RequestSchema.json")}></RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes {...require("./discover-json-web-keys.StatusCodes.json")}></StatusCodes>
